text:
For those astounded by how well these two songs fit together I will provide an explanation as to why: 

They both have the exact same chord progression at the same rhythmic velocity (meaning that the chords change in time with﻿ each other). When the two melodies are played simultaneously, you get a musical effect called "counterpoint" in which the musical texture is vastly enriched by their interaction. Counterpoint is a common technique in classical music and in some movie/video game music
